note_families.policy: Sales: cash basis at time of sale net of sales tax. Royalties: percent of sales at time underlying sales occur. Rent: minimum straight-line over franchise term + variable percent at time sales occur. Initial fees: over 20-year franchise term as performance obligation satisfied. Technology: gross basis (principal). Brand licensing: percent of sales.
Straight-line method. Buildings: up to 40 years. Leasehold improvements: lesser of useful life or lease term (includes option periods). Equipment: 3 to 12 years. Capitalized software: 3 to 10 years.

Annual fourth quarter review + event-driven. Initially grouped at field office level. If indicator exists, undiscounted future cash flows vs carrying value for individual restaurants. If impaired, discounted cash flows for fair value. Held for disposal: recognized when plan committed and disposal probable within 12 months.
note_families.charges: No material impairment charges identified for 2024, 2023, 2022.

note_families.policy: Separate-return basis. Included in McDonald's consolidated federal return. State returns may be combined or separate. Deferred assets/liabilities for temporary differences.

Lessee in significant real estate portfolio. Ground leases (lease land, own building) + improved leases (lease land and buildings). ROU and liability at PV of estimated future minimum lease payments. Discount rate: collateralized incremental borrowing rate. Elected not to separate non-lease components.
Ongoing evaluation of franchisees, JV partners, suppliers, advertising cooperatives. Generally qualify for scope exception. Consolidation not appropriate for periods presented.

events: $2.4B payable arrangements with McDonald's Corp matured Feb 17, 2025 and converted to equity

note_families.policy: Company advertising costs are contributions to cooperatives based on percent of sales. Cooperatives are independent; McDonald's not primary beneficiary; consolidation not appropriate.

Excess of cost over net tangible and identifiable intangible assets. Assigned to US market reporting unit. Primarily from franchisee restaurant purchases. Annual fourth quarter impairment test. Qualitative assessment performed; no impairment identified.

note_families.hedging: Derivative contracts to hedge nonqualified plan liabilities

note_families.policy: Ordinary course proceedings. Required accrual after analysis. No material adverse effect expected on financial condition or results.
